screen.notes: FINDING: No wireframe; REVENUE-CRITICAL. Testable: plan load, interval switching, GST pricing, subscribe (unauthenticated).

claim_rows.claim: All 27 core Phase-7 gates were VERIFIED-CLOSED including: 0 console errors across 20 routes (GATE-16), 0 same-origin 5xx (GATE-17), backend 676 pytest passed (GATE-19), frontend 297 vitest passed (GATE-20), Playwright E2E green (GATE-21)
claim_rows.method: Playwright console/network sweep across the 20 documented routes on prod; re-run backend pytest / frontend vitest suites (suite-run for counts); manual click-through spot-check for E2E flows

claim_rows.claim: All users are backfilled to the Free plan with a quota row (GATE-34)
claim_rows.method: Check /billing/entitlement for an existing/fresh user account, confirm Free-plan default and a quota row exists

claim_rows.claim: The subscription paywall (AETHER_REQUIRE_PAID_SUBSCRIPTION=true) is ACTIVE in production -- an unpaid agent run attempt returns HTTP 402 subscription_required
claim_rows.method: Attempt an agent run as an unpaid/free-tier user on prod, confirm 402 with subscription_required error code

claim_rows.claim: A Playwright sweep of 14 dashboard routes + /pricing + /admin as a paid admin showed 0 console errors / 0 failed requests / 0 page errors (GATE-03)
claim_rows.method: Playwright sweep of the listed routes on prod, capture console + network errors

claim_rows.claim: Stripe billing round-trip (checkout, webhook, GST invoice, ABN/Tax) is BLOCKED-ON-HUMAN pending operator-supplied Stripe test keys, webhook secret, Price IDs, and ABN/Tax enrollment (GATE-13/14/15/16/33)
claim_rows.method: Attempt POST /billing/checkout on prod; observe whether it succeeds (would indicate Stripe now configured, contradicting this claim) or fails/degrades honestly (would confirm still-blocked)

claim_rows.claim: Subscription pricing: 4 tiers -- Free A$0 / Starter A$19 / Pro A$39 / Power A$69 monthly; A$179/359/649 annual; GST-inclusive AUD with gst = round(total/11, 2)
claim_rows.method: GET /billing/plans on prod (or view /pricing), confirm tier names/prices match; compute GST via the stated formula on a sample total and compare to the displayed value

claim_rows.claim: The /pricing page exists and is publicly viewable (unauthenticated)
claim_rows.method: Visit /pricing unauthenticated, confirm the page renders with plan info

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named pricing or pricing_auth/pricing_unauth or baseline/pricing depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
